emails.subject: Duke
emails.body: On Feb 7, we sold 10,000 to Duke Energy Field Services at Waha. However, I entered the deal (#603484) under Duke Energy Marketing (Can you believe I made a mistake?). To correct this, I created a new ticket (#700132) under DEFS. Mary Please repath these deals and let Megan know when you're done. Sorry for the extra work. D
